title: Certificatelistitemmessagemetadata
description: CertificateListItemMessageMetadata represents the metadata associated to a CertificateListItemMessage

initiated_at.description: Date and time at which the certificate was initialized and ready to accept single signatures from signers

sealed_at.description: Date and time at which the certificate was sealed (when the quorum of single signatures was reached so that a multi signature could be aggregated from them)

total_signers.description: The number of the signers with their stakes and verification keys
